Class SpaceshipComponent

java.lang.Object
Model.Ship.Components.SpaceshipComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AlienLifeSupport, BatteryCompartment, Cabin, Cannon, CargoHold, Engine, ShieldGenerator, StructuralModule
public abstract class SpaceshipComponent extends Object implements Serializable, Cloneable
Abstract class representing a spaceship component. Handles rotation, connectors, and association with the shipboard.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • SpaceshipComponent

      public SpaceshipComponent(Card type, ConnectorType front, ConnectorType rear, ConnectorType left, ConnectorType right)
      Constructor, that does not set the image path!

    • SpaceshipComponent

      public SpaceshipComponent(Card type, ConnectorType front, ConnectorType rear, ConnectorType left, ConnectorType right, String imagePath)
      Constructor with image path. This is used by the ComponentFactory to load spaceship components from JSON configuration.

      Rotates to match a specific target orientation (minimal steps).

    • rotateClockwise

      private Direction rotateClockwise(Direction dir)
      Rotates the current orientation 90 degrees clockwise.
      Parameters:
      dir - the current direction
      Returns:
      the new direction after rotation

    • getOrientation

      public Direction getOrientation()
      Returns the current orientation of the component.
